metadata.designStandard: Multiple choice only - 20 questions per grammar point with complete 4 options

grammarPoints.name: Simple Present Tense
grammarPoints.description: 用于表示现在的事实、习惯性动作或普遍真理。标志词：always, usually, often, sometimes, never, every day等。

questions.question: She ________ (go) to the library every day.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Present Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她每天去图书馆。

questions.question: The librarian ________ (recommend) good books usually.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Present Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她每天去图书馆。

questions.question: They ________ (volunteer) at the shelter every weekend.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Present Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她每天去图书馆。

questions.question: He ________ (never/miss) any detective stories.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Present Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她每天去图书馆。

questions.question: The organization ________ (provide) donations every month.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Present Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她每天去图书馆。

questions.question: Science fiction ________ (attract) many young readers.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Present Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她每天去图书馆。

questions.question: The interviewer ________ (ask) important questions usually.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Present Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她每天去图书馆。

questions.question: Volunteers ________ (help) people in need often.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Present Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她每天去图书馆。

questions.question: The elderly ________ (value) teamwork always.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Present Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她每天去图书馆。

questions.question: She ________ (sign) up for charity work every year.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Present Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她每天去图书馆。

questions.question: The detective ________ (investigate) mysteries sometimes.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Present Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她每天去图书馆。

questions.question: They ________ (donate) money to the organization every month.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Present Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她每天去图书馆。

questions.question: The lady ________ (make) a difference in the community.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Present Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她每天去图书馆。

questions.question: The gentleman ________ (help) others often.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Present Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她每天去图书馆。

questions.question: Readers ________ (enjoy) adventure stories usually.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Present Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她每天去图书馆。

questions.question: The youth ________ (participate) in community service every day.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Present Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她每天去图书馆。

questions.question: She ________ (never/tell) lies to her friends.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Present Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她每天去图书馆。

questions.question: The organization ________ (help) people in need always.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Present Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她每天去图书馆。

questions.question: They ________ (work) at the shelter every Saturday.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Present Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她每天去图书馆。

questions.question: The interviewer ________ (record) the conversation usually.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Present Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她每天去图书馆。

grammarPoints.name: Simple Past Tense
grammarPoints.description: 用于表示过去某个时间完成的动作。标志词：yesterday, last week, ago, in 2010等。

questions.question: She ________ (hear) of the mystery yesterday.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Past Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她昨天听说了这个谜团。

questions.question: The detective ________ (find) the evidence last week.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Past Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她昨天听说了这个谜团。

questions.question: They ________ (visit) the shelter two days ago.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Past Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她昨天听说了这个谜团。

questions.question: He ________ (lock) the cage yesterday evening.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Past Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她昨天听说了这个谜团。

questions.question: The organization ________ (provide) donations last month.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Past Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她昨天听说了这个谜团。

questions.question: She ________ (steal) the book three days ago.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Past Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她昨天听说了这个谜团。

questions.question: The interviewer ________ (ask) important questions last year.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Past Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她昨天听说了这个谜团。

questions.question: Volunteers ________ (help) the elderly last weekend.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Past Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她昨天听说了这个谜团。

questions.question: The naughty boy ________ (punish) by his teacher yesterday.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Past Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她昨天听说了这个谜团。

questions.question: They ________ (destroy) the enemy base in 2020.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Past Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她昨天听说了这个谜团。

questions.question: The army ________ (defeat) the enemy last year.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Past Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她昨天听说了这个谜团。

questions.question: She ________ (recommend) that book two weeks ago.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Past Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她昨天听说了这个谜团。

questions.question: The librarian ________ (unlock) the door this morning.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Past Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她昨天听说了这个谜团。

questions.question: They ________ (sign) up for the charity last month.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Past Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她昨天听说了这个谜团。

questions.question: The detective ________ (prove) his innocence yesterday.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Past Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她昨天听说了这个谜团。

questions.question: She ________ (get) lost in the city last week.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Past Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她昨天听说了这个谜团。

questions.question: The organization ________ (donate) money three months ago.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Past Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她昨天听说了这个谜团。

questions.question: They ________ (come) along with us yesterday.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Past Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她昨天听说了这个谜团。

questions.question: The lady ________ (make) a difference last year.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Past Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她昨天听说了这个谜团。

questions.question: The gentleman ________ (help) the community in 2015.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Simple Past Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她昨天听说了这个谜团。

grammarPoints.name: Present Perfect Tense
grammarPoints.description: 用于表示从过去开始一直持续到现在的动作，或对现在有影响的过去动作。标志词：already, yet, just, since, for, ever等。

questions.question: She ________ (read) the science fiction novel already.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Present Perfect Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她已经读过这部小说。

questions.question: They ________ (not/finish) the project yet.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Present Perfect Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她已经读过这部小说。

questions.question: He ________ (just/arrive) at the shelter.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Present Perfect Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她已经读过这部小说。

questions.question: They ________ (volunteer) here since 2015.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Present Perfect Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她已经读过这部小说。

questions.question: She ________ (work) for the organization for five years.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Present Perfect Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她已经读过这部小说。

questions.question: Have you ________ (ever/hear) of this mystery?
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Present Perfect Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她已经读过这部小说。

questions.question: The detective ________ (find) the hidden evidence already.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Present Perfect Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她已经读过这部小说。

questions.question: They ________ (not/sign) up for the charity yet.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Present Perfect Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她已经读过这部小说。

questions.question: She ________ (just/unlock) the cage.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Present Perfect Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她已经读过这部小说。

questions.question: The organization ________ (donate) money since last year.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Present Perfect Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她已经读过这部小说。

questions.question: Have they ________ (ever/visit) the stadium?
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Present Perfect Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她已经读过这部小说。

questions.question: The interviewer ________ (just/finish) the interview.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Present Perfect Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她已经读过这部小说。

questions.question: She ________ (live) in this city for ten years.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Present Perfect Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她已经读过这部小说。

questions.question: They ________ (not/receive) the donation yet.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Present Perfect Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她已经读过这部小说。

questions.question: The detective ________ (solve) many mysteries already.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Present Perfect Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她已经读过这部小说。

questions.question: Have you ________ (ever/make) a difference in your community?
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Present Perfect Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她已经读过这部小说。

questions.question: She ________ (work) as a librarian since 2010.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Present Perfect Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她已经读过这部小说。

questions.question: They ________ (not/prove) their innocence yet.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Present Perfect Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她已经读过这部小说。

questions.question: The youth ________ (participate) in community service for many years.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Present Perfect Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她已经读过这部小说。

questions.question: Have you ________ (ever/hear) about the charity organization?
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Present Perfect Tense的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 她已经读过这部小说。

grammarPoints.name: Passive Voice
grammarPoints.description: 用于表示动作的承受者作为主语。标志词：by, is/are/was/were + 过去分词。

questions.question: The mystery novel ________ (write) by a famous author in 2020.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Passive Voice的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这部小说是由著名作家写的。

questions.question: The shelter ________ (build) by the organization in 2015.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Passive Voice的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这部小说是由著名作家写的。

questions.question: The donations ________ (collect) every month.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Passive Voice的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这部小说是由著名作家写的。

questions.question: The evidence ________ (find) by the detective yesterday.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Passive Voice的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这部小说是由著名作家写的。

questions.question: The naughty boy ________ (punish) by his teacher.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Passive Voice的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这部小说是由著名作家写的。

questions.question: The book ________ (recommend) by the librarian.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Passive Voice的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这部小说是由著名作家写的。

questions.question: The cage ________ (unlock) by the volunteer.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Passive Voice的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这部小说是由著名作家写的。

questions.question: The interview ________ (record) by the interviewer.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Passive Voice的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这部小说是由著名作家写的。

questions.question: The enemy ________ (defeat) by the army.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Passive Voice的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这部小说是由著名作家写的。

questions.question: The base ________ (destroy) in 2020.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Passive Voice的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这部小说是由著名作家写的。

questions.question: The project ________ (complete) by the team.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Passive Voice的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这部小说是由著名作家写的。

questions.question: The story ________ (tell) by the author.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Passive Voice的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这部小说是由著名作家写的。

questions.question: The donation ________ (receive) by the organization.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Passive Voice的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这部小说是由著名作家写的。

questions.question: The mystery ________ (solve) by the detective.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Passive Voice的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这部小说是由著名作家写的。

questions.question: The letter ________ (send) yesterday.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Passive Voice的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这部小说是由著名作家写的。

questions.question: The document ________ (sign) by the gentleman.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Passive Voice的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这部小说是由著名作家写的。

questions.question: The award ________ (give) to the volunteer.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Passive Voice的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这部小说是由著名作家写的。

questions.question: The meeting ________ (hold) last week.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Passive Voice的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这部小说是由著名作家写的。

questions.question: The announcement ________ (make) by the organization.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Passive Voice的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这部小说是由著名作家写的。

questions.question: The decision ________ (make) by the committee.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Passive Voice的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这部小说是由著名作家写的。

grammarPoints.name: Usage of 'so...that'
grammarPoints.description: 表示'如此...以至于'，用来表示结果。标志词：so...that结构。

questions.question: The story was so interesting that everyone ________ (want) to read it.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'so...that'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个故事如此有趣以至于每个人都想读它。

questions.question: The mystery was so confusing that nobody ________ (understand) it.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'so...that'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个故事如此有趣以至于每个人都想读它。

questions.question: The shelter was so helpful that many people ________ (donate) money.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'so...that'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个故事如此有趣以至于每个人都想读它。

questions.question: The interview was so detailed that the lady ________ (feel) satisfied.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'so...that'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个故事如此有趣以至于每个人都想读它。

questions.question: The book was so popular that it ________ (sell) out quickly.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'so...that'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个故事如此有趣以至于每个人都想读它。

questions.question: The detective was so clever that he ________ (solve) the mystery.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'so...that'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个故事如此有趣以至于每个人都想读它。

questions.question: The recommendation was so good that they ________ (decide) to read it.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'so...that'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个故事如此有趣以至于每个人都想读它。

questions.question: The organization was so successful that more people ________ (join) it.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'so...that'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个故事如此有趣以至于每个人都想读它。

questions.question: The effort was so great that everyone ________ (appreciate) it.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'so...that'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个故事如此有趣以至于每个人都想读它。

questions.question: The teamwork was so strong that they ________ (achieve) their goal.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'so...that'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个故事如此有趣以至于每个人都想读它。

questions.question: The donation was so large that the shelter ________ (expand) its services.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'so...that'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个故事如此有趣以至于每个人都想读它。

questions.question: The interview was so impressive that the candidate ________ (get) the job.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'so...that'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个故事如此有趣以至于每个人都想读它。

questions.question: The adventure was so exciting that everyone ________ (want) to go again.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'so...that'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个故事如此有趣以至于每个人都想读它。

questions.question: The mystery was so intriguing that readers ________ (keep) guessing.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'so...that'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个故事如此有趣以至于每个人都想读它。

questions.question: The story was so touching that many people ________ (cry).
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'so...that'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个故事如此有趣以至于每个人都想读它。

questions.question: The recommendation was so strong that she ________ (trust) it.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'so...that'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个故事如此有趣以至于每个人都想读它。

questions.question: The shelter was so welcoming that visitors ________ (feel) comfortable.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'so...that'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个故事如此有趣以至于每个人都想读它。

questions.question: The organization was so dedicated that they ________ (receive) an award.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'so...that'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个故事如此有趣以至于每个人都想读它。

questions.question: The effort was so remarkable that people ________ (recognize) it.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'so...that'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个故事如此有趣以至于每个人都想读它。

questions.question: The teamwork was so effective that the project ________ (complete) on time.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'so...that'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这个故事如此有趣以至于每个人都想读它。

grammarPoints.name: Usage of 'when' and 'while'
grammarPoints.description: 'when' 表示某一时刻，'while' 表示一段时间。标志词：when, while。

questions.question: When she ________ (hear) of the adventure, she was excited.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'when' and 'while'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 当她听说这次冒险时，她很兴奋。

questions.question: While he ________ (investigate) the mystery, he found a clue.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'when' and 'while'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 当她听说这次冒险时，她很兴奋。

questions.question: When they ________ (arrive) at the shelter, it was raining.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'when' and 'while'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 当她听说这次冒险时，她很兴奋。

questions.question: While she ________ (read) the book, she fell asleep.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'when' and 'while'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 当她听说这次冒险时，她很兴奋。

questions.question: When the interviewer ________ (ask) the question, everyone listened.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'when' and 'while'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 当她听说这次冒险时，她很兴奋。

questions.question: While the volunteers ________ (work) at the shelter, they helped many people.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'when' and 'while'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 当她听说这次冒险时，她很兴奋。

questions.question: When the detective ________ (find) the evidence, he was surprised.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'when' and 'while'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 当她听说这次冒险时，她很兴奋。

questions.question: While the organization ________ (provide) donations, they helped the elderly.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'when' and 'while'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 当她听说这次冒险时，她很兴奋。

questions.question: When she ________ (see) the naughty boy, she scolded him.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'when' and 'while'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 当她听说这次冒险时，她很兴奋。

questions.question: While they ________ (discuss) the mystery, new information came out.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'when' and 'while'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 当她听说这次冒险时，她很兴奋。

questions.question: When the gentleman ________ (enter) the room, everyone stood up.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'when' and 'while'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 当她听说这次冒险时，她很兴奋。

questions.question: While the lady ________ (shop) at the market, she met an old friend.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'when' and 'while'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 当她听说这次冒险时，她很兴奋。

questions.question: When the army ________ (attack) the base, soldiers fought bravely.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'when' and 'while'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 当她听说这次冒险时，她很兴奋。

questions.question: While the librarian ________ (organize) the books, a visitor came in.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'when' and 'while'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 当她听说这次冒险时，她很兴奋。

questions.question: When the youth ________ (join) the organization, they felt proud.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'when' and 'while'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 当她听说这次冒险时，她很兴奋。

questions.question: While the interviewer ________ (conduct) the interview, the recorder was on.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'when' and 'while'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 当她听说这次冒险时，她很兴奋。

questions.question: When she ________ (unlock) the cage, the animal ran away.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'when' and 'while'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 当她听说这次冒险时，她很兴奋。

questions.question: While they ________ (donate) money, more people came to help.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'when' and 'while'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 当她听说这次冒险时，她很兴奋。

questions.question: When the detective ________ (solve) the mystery, everyone cheered.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'when' and 'while'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 当她听说这次冒险时，她很兴奋。

questions.question: While the story ________ (unfold), readers were on the edge of their seats.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'when' and 'while'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 当她听说这次冒险时，她很兴奋。

grammarPoints.name: Usage of 'as soon as'
grammarPoints.description: 'as soon as' 表示'一...就...'，引导时间状语从句。标志词：as soon as。

questions.question: As soon as she ________ (hear) of the mystery, she wanted to solve it.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'as soon as'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 一她听说这个谜团，她就想解决它。

questions.question: As soon as the detective ________ (find) the clue, he called the police.

questions.chineseTranslation: 一她听说这个谜团，她就想解决它。

questions.question: As soon as they ________ (arrive) at the shelter, they started working.

questions.chineseTranslation: 一她听说这个谜团，她就想解决它。

questions.question: As soon as the interviewer ________ (finish) the interview, he left.

questions.question: As soon as the volunteers ________ (see) the elderly, they helped them.

questions.question: As soon as the organization ________ (receive) the donation, they thanked the donor.

questions.question: As soon as the naughty boy ________ (see) the teacher, he ran away.

questions.question: As soon as the army ________ (attack) the base, the soldiers fought back.

questions.question: As soon as the gentleman ________ (enter) the room, he greeted everyone.

questions.question: As soon as the donation ________ (arrive), the organization thanked the donor.

questions.question: As soon as the detective ________ (solve) the case, he reported it.

questions.question: As soon as the story ________ (end), readers wanted more.

questions.question: As soon as the shelter ________ (open), people came to help.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'as soon as'的用法。

grammarPoints.name: Usage of 'unless'
grammarPoints.description: 'unless' 表示'除非'，相当于 'if not'。标志词：unless。

questions.question: Unless you ________ (read) the book, you won't understand the mystery.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'unless'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 除非你读这本书，否则你不会理解这个谜团。

questions.question: Unless the detective ________ (find) the evidence, the case will remain unsolved.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'unless'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 除非你读这本书，否则你不会理解这个谜团。

questions.question: Unless they ________ (help) the elderly, the shelter will close.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'unless'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 除非你读这本书，否则你不会理解这个谜团。

questions.question: Unless the organization ________ (receive) donations, it cannot continue.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'unless'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 除非你读这本书，否则你不会理解这个谜团。

questions.question: Unless she ________ (study) hard, she won't pass the exam.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'unless'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 除非你读这本书，否则你不会理解这个谜团。

questions.question: Unless the volunteers ________ (come), the event will be cancelled.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'unless'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 除非你读这本书，否则你不会理解这个谜团。

questions.question: Unless the interviewer ________ (ask) good questions, the interview will be boring.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'unless'的用法。

questions.question: Unless the naughty boy ________ (behave), he will be punished.

questions.question: Unless the army ________ (defend) the base, it will be captured.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'unless'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 除非你读这本书，否则你不会理解这个谜团。

questions.question: Unless the librarian ________ (recommend) good books, readers will be disappointed.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'unless'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 除非你读这本书，否则你不会理解这个谜团。

questions.question: Unless the gentleman ________ (help) others, he won't be respected.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'unless'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 除非你读这本书，否则你不会理解这个谜团。

questions.question: Unless the lady ________ (donate) money, the charity won't succeed.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'unless'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 除非你读这本书，否则你不会理解这个谜团。

questions.question: Unless the youth ________ (participate) in community service, society won't improve.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'unless'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 除非你读这本书，否则你不会理解这个谜团。

questions.question: Unless the detective ________ (solve) the mystery, people will keep guessing.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'unless'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 除非你读这本书，否则你不会理解这个谜团。

questions.question: Unless the story ________ (have) a good ending, readers will be sad.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Usage of 'unless'的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 除非你读这本书，否则你不会理解这个谜团。

questions.question: Unless the shelter ________ (provide) good care, animals will suffer.

questions.chineseTranslation: 除非你读这本书，否则你不会理解这个谜团。

questions.question: Unless the interviewer ________ (record) the conversation, people will forget.

questions.chineseTranslation: 除非你读这本书，否则你不会理解这个谜团。

questions.question: Unless the organization ________ (make) a difference, the community won't change.

questions.question: Unless the adventure ________ (be) exciting, nobody will join.

grammarPoints.name: Past Participle as Post-modifier
grammarPoints.description: 过去分词作后置定语，表示被动关系或完成含义。标志词：by + 施动者、in + 年份/地点。

questions.question: The mystery novel ________ (write) by a famous author is very popular.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Past Participle as Post-modifier的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 由著名作家写的悬疑小说很受欢迎。

questions.question: The shelter ________ (build) by the organization in 2015 helps many people.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Past Participle as Post-modifier的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 由著名作家写的悬疑小说很受欢迎。

questions.question: The donations ________ (collect) by volunteers are used wisely.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Past Participle as Post-modifier的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 由著名作家写的悬疑小说很受欢迎。

questions.question: The evidence ________ (find) by the detective solved the case.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Past Participle as Post-modifier的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 由著名作家写的悬疑小说很受欢迎。

questions.question: The boy ________ (punish) by his teacher apologized later.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Past Participle as Post-modifier的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 由著名作家写的悬疑小说很受欢迎。

questions.question: The book ________ (recommend) by the librarian became a bestseller.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Past Participle as Post-modifier的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 由著名作家写的悬疑小说很受欢迎。

questions.question: The cage ________ (unlock) by the volunteer released the animal.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Past Participle as Post-modifier的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 由著名作家写的悬疑小说很受欢迎。

questions.question: The interview ________ (record) by the interviewer was very informative.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Past Participle as Post-modifier的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 由著名作家写的悬疑小说很受欢迎。

questions.question: The enemy ________ (defeat) by the army surrendered.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Past Participle as Post-modifier的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 由著名作家写的悬疑小说很受欢迎。

questions.question: The base ________ (destroy) in 2020 was never rebuilt.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Past Participle as Post-modifier的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 由著名作家写的悬疑小说很受欢迎。

questions.question: The project ________ (complete) by the team was successful.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Past Participle as Post-modifier的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 由著名作家写的悬疑小说很受欢迎。

questions.question: The story ________ (tell) by the author touched many hearts.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Past Participle as Post-modifier的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 由著名作家写的悬疑小说很受欢迎。

questions.question: The donation ________ (receive) by the organization helped the poor.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Past Participle as Post-modifier的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 由著名作家写的悬疑小说很受欢迎。

questions.question: The mystery ________ (solve) by the detective was very complex.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Past Participle as Post-modifier的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 由著名作家写的悬疑小说很受欢迎。

questions.question: The letter ________ (send) yesterday arrived today.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Past Participle as Post-modifier的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 由著名作家写的悬疑小说很受欢迎。

questions.question: The document ________ (sign) by the gentleman was official.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Past Participle as Post-modifier的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 由著名作家写的悬疑小说很受欢迎。

questions.question: The award ________ (give) to the volunteer was well-deserved.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Past Participle as Post-modifier的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 由著名作家写的悬疑小说很受欢迎。

questions.question: The meeting ________ (hold) last week was very productive.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Past Participle as Post-modifier的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 由著名作家写的悬疑小说很受欢迎。

questions.question: The announcement ________ (make) by the organization was important.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Past Participle as Post-modifier的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 由著名作家写的悬疑小说很受欢迎。

grammarPoints.name: Possessive Pronouns
grammarPoints.description: 物主代词分为形容词性（my, your, his...）和名词性（mine, yours, his...）。

questions.question: This is my book. Where is ________?
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Possessive Pronouns的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这是我的书。你的在哪里？

questions.question: His pen is blue. ________ is red.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Possessive Pronouns的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这是我的书。你的在哪里？

questions.question: Their house is big. ________ is small.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Possessive Pronouns的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这是我的书。你的在哪里？

questions.question: Her book is interesting. ________ is boring.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Possessive Pronouns的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这是我的书。你的在哪里？

questions.question: My idea is good. ________ is better.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Possessive Pronouns的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这是我的书。你的在哪里？

questions.question: The dog is ________. It belongs to me.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Possessive Pronouns的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这是我的书。你的在哪里？

questions.question: The cat is ________. It belongs to her.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Possessive Pronouns的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这是我的书。你的在哪里？

questions.question: The car is ________. It belongs to them.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Possessive Pronouns的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这是我的书。你的在哪里？

questions.question: The house is ________. It belongs to us.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Possessive Pronouns的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这是我的书。你的在哪里？

questions.question: The book is ________. It belongs to him.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Possessive Pronouns的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这是我的书。你的在哪里？

questions.question: This pen is ________, not mine.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Possessive Pronouns的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这是我的书。你的在哪里？

questions.question: That umbrella is ________, not hers.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Possessive Pronouns的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这是我的书。你的在哪里？

questions.question: These shoes are ________, not theirs.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Possessive Pronouns的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这是我的书。你的在哪里？

questions.question: That bag is ________, not ours.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Possessive Pronouns的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这是我的书。你的在哪里？

questions.question: This notebook is ________, not yours.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Possessive Pronouns的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这是我的书。你的在哪里？

questions.question: The responsibility is ________. You must do it.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Possessive Pronouns的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这是我的书。你的在哪里？

questions.question: The choice is ________. I will decide.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Possessive Pronouns的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这是我的书。你的在哪里？

questions.question: The problem is ________. They must solve it.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Possessive Pronouns的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这是我的书。你的在哪里？

questions.question: The opportunity is ________. We should take it.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Possessive Pronouns的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这是我的书。你的在哪里？

questions.question: The decision is ________. He will make it.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Possessive Pronouns的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这是我的书。你的在哪里？

grammarPoints.name: Relative Clauses: who/that
grammarPoints.description: 定语从句中 who 用于人作主语/宾语，that 用于人或物作主语/宾语。

questions.question: The man ________ is talking to the teacher is my uncle.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Relative Clauses: who/that的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 正在和老师说话的男人是我的叔叔。

questions.question: The woman ________ works at the shelter is very kind.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Relative Clauses: who/that的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 正在和老师说话的男人是我的叔叔。

questions.question: The detective ________ solved the mystery is famous.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Relative Clauses: who/that的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 正在和老师说话的男人是我的叔叔。

questions.question: The boy ________ is playing in the park is my brother.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Relative Clauses: who/that的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 正在和老师说话的男人是我的叔叔。

questions.question: The girl ________ won the award is very smart.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Relative Clauses: who/that的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 正在和老师说话的男人是我的叔叔。

questions.question: The author ________ wrote this book is very talented.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Relative Clauses: who/that的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 正在和老师说话的男人是我的叔叔。

questions.question: The volunteer ________ helped us yesterday is very kind.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Relative Clauses: who/that的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 正在和老师说话的男人是我的叔叔。

questions.question: The interviewer ________ asked me questions was very professional.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Relative Clauses: who/that的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 正在和老师说话的男人是我的叔叔。

questions.question: The gentleman ________ donated money is very generous.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Relative Clauses: who/that的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 正在和老师说话的男人是我的叔叔。

questions.question: The lady ________ made a difference in the community is respected.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Relative Clauses: who/that的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 正在和老师说话的男人是我的叔叔。

questions.question: The person ________ I met yesterday is a teacher.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Relative Clauses: who/that的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 正在和老师说话的男人是我的叔叔。

questions.question: The people ________ work at the organization are dedicated.

grammarPoints.name: Relative Clauses: where
grammarPoints.description: 定语从句中 where 用于地点作地点状语，可转化为 in/at which。

questions.question: This is the factory ________ my father worked.
questions.explanation: 这道题考查的是Relative Clauses: where的用法。
questions.chineseTranslation: 这是我父亲工作的工厂。
